_note: Generation record for hosted stock images. Images with a prompt were generated via the Pollinations API (model=flux/sana). IMPORTANT: as of 2026-07-10 Pollinations only generates square-native (768x768 anonymous cap) and non-uniformly stretches any non-square request — always generate square, center-crop to 768x432 (16:9), then uniformly upscale to 1672x941 with sips. A framing suffix (subject centered, generous vertical margins) keeps subjects inside the crop. Images without a prompt predate prompt tracking (June 2026). Update this file whenever images are added or regenerated.
